breakdown: This PR adds a TypedDict schema for RewardsBox and a validate_rewards_box() function to enforce schema compliance. The test file is comprehensive, covering TypedDict existence, required fields, type validation for bool/int/list fields, and rejection of unknown extra fields. Naming is clear and specific. Error handling uses boolean return values appropriately for validation. Type safety is excellent with TypedDict preventing Any escape. Architecture properly separates type definitions into custom_types.py. Documentation explains the WHY (avoiding Any type problems) in test docstrings.
key_changes: Added RewardsBox TypedDict in custom_types with required fields: level_up_available, xp_gained, current_xp, next_level_xp, gold, loot, source
Added validate_rewards_box() function for schema enforcement
Test coverage validates acceptance of valid data, rejection of missing fields, wrong types, and unknown fields
Type validation checks for bool, int, float, str, and list types with explicit isinstance checks
Schema rejects extra unknown fields for strict compliance
